agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines an Article 4 Direction for the St Albans City Core. Page 3 contains a clear map of the boundary on an OS background. I geocoded the area using 'Bricket Road' and 'St Albans City Core'. The match at (51.7525, -0.3354) was exceptionally strong with 789 inliers, high scale consistency (0.82), and strong road name agreement (0.75), confirming the location in central St Albans.
